caption: The video depicts a group of medical professionals engaged in a discussion during what appears to be a simulation week, as indicated by the text "Sim Week" on the screen. The setting is a small room with plain walls and simple furniture, suggesting a clinical or educational environment. Four individuals are seated in chairs arranged in a semi-circle, all wearing masks and casual or scrubs attire. One person, dressed in blue scrubs, seems to be leading the conversation, gesturing with their hands while holding some papers. Another individual, wearing pink scrubs, is leaning forward with their head resting on their hand, possibly indicating fatigue or deep thought. A third person, in a black shirt and pink pants, is also actively participating, while the fourth, in a black jacket and blue pants, is holding a document and appears to be explaining something. The overall atmosphere suggests a collaborative and focused discussion, likely centered around patient care or medical procedures.
